session.assistant:
## All PR Comments Addressed
| Metric | Count | |--------|-------| | Total comments | 7 review threads + 1 discussion | | Actionable (code changes) | 7 | | Batches | 1 | | Commits | 1 (`2b707c870`) |
All review threads resolved. Discussion comment replied to.
**Next steps:** 1. Push changes: `git push` (or `gt ss` for Graphite) - If push is rejected (non-fast-forward): Run `/erk:reconcile-with-remote` to resolve. Do NOT use `git pull --rebase`. 2. Wait for CI to pass 3. Request re-review if needed
